daily_fact: Stay engaged with your community through local news and civic participation.
topline_md: Recent updates from New York include a rabid coyote attack, potential norovirus contamination in seafood, and a federal judge's ruling affecting the Gateway Tunnel project, alongside ongoing discussions about NYC's homeless population and safety measures for subway crews.

risks_alerts.title: Risks & Alerts
risks_alerts.summary_md:
### Risks & Alerts

- Rabid coyote attacks 3 people and 6 dogs north of NYC; residents advised to stay vigilant. [↗](https://news.google.?oc=5)
- Seafood sold in NY may be contaminated with norovirus; consumers urged to check sources before purchasing. [↗](https://news.google.?oc=5)
- FDNY battles duct fire at New Hudson Yards restaurant Saverne; no injuries reported.
